name: Pressure Cooker Black Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the draining basket in the pressure cooker.
2. Rinse the beans.
3. Add the beans and all remaining ingredients except sherry to the basket.
4. Cover the cooker, lock the lid, and bring to pressure.
5. Cook at high pressure for 45 minutes.
6. Lift the basket and allow solids to drain.
7. Remove the pork knuckles.
8. Puree the remaining solids in two batches using the metal blade of a food processor.
9. Return the puree to the stock and stir until well combined.
10. Add sherry to taste.
11. Cut the meat from the ham hocks into small pieces and add to the soup.
12. Serve with sourdough rolls.
